description:
The abrt-addon-python package can be removed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf remove abrt-addon-python
rationale:
<tt>abrt-addon-python</tt> contains python hook and python analyzer
plugin for handling uncaught exceptions in python programs.
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the abrt-addon-python package is installed: 
$ rpm -q abrt-addon-python
title: Uninstall abrt-addon-python Package
